description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-style shelving unit with four wide, flat shelves supported by a sturdy metal frame. The frame appears to be constructed from weathered steel or iron, with visible signs of rust and patina, giving it a worn, utilitarian look. Each shelf is made from a solid, dark material, possibly metal or treated wood, and is reinforced with metal brackets and straps at the corners. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The overall construction is robust, suggesting it is designed to hold heavy objects, making it suitable for garages, workshops, or urban storage spaces. The finish is matte and rough, emphasizing its industrial character.
description: A weathered, industrial metal shelving unit with four open, reinforced shelves and a rugged, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, open and accessible, with visible metal brackets and a weathered finish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the sturdy, rectangular frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back supports and metal straps, with the shelves' undersides visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the frame and shelf alignment from the other side.
